_comment: Centralized version pins for TypeScript/Web/RN deps. Referenced by syncpack (.syncpackrc.json) to enforce consistency across all package.json files in the monorepo. When bumping a value here, run `npx syncpack fix-mismatches` to propagate the change. See scripts/validation/gates/check_typescript_centralization.sh for the CI gate.

_notes.long: Held at ^5.x. The published @runanywhere/proto-ts is generated against long 5.x; 6.x (if released) would be a separate migration.
_notes.protobufjs: Held at ^7.x. The published @runanywhere/proto-ts is generated against protobufjs 7.x; 8.x is a separate migration.
_notes.eslint: ESLint 9.x is now used across the monorepo (including RN packages). @react-native/eslint-config 0.85.x supports ESLint 8 and 9, so RN parity is preserved.
_notes.vite: Pinned for examples/web only. Playground/ is excluded from centralization entirely (not in .syncpackrc.json source list).
_notes.typescript-eslint: Applies only to the unified 'typescript-eslint' meta-package consumed by the web SDK packages. The separate @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin + @typescript-eslint/parser packages used by the RN tree are not covered here.
_notes.@runanywhere/proto-ts: Schema-sensitive: every TS SDK package depends on the same proto-ts dist. Bump together via scripts/release/sync-versions.sh.
_notes.react-native: RN runtime (dev/prod deps only). The Hermes / JSI / NitroModules ABI we ship against tracks this version. SDK peerDependencies stay open ranges (>=0.83.1) and are intentionally NOT pinned. Bump in lockstep with the example app and CI matrix.
_notes.react: RN runtime counterpart (dev/prod deps only; peer ranges stay open). Keep aligned with the supported RN range.
_notes.@eslint/js: Flat-config preset shipped under the @eslint scope. Should track the eslint major; centralizing prevents drift between web SDK packages.
_notes.tsd: Type-definition test runner used by sdk/runanywhere-web/packages/core. Centralized so type-tests stay reproducible across packages that adopt them.
_notes.react-native-nitro-modules: RN NitroModules runtime. Intentionally pinned to ^0.33.9 (cross-minor with nitrogen ^0.34.1) — the Nitrogen 0.34.x codegen on this branch emits output validated to compile against the 0.33.x runtime ABI (see sdk/runanywhere-react-native/packages/core/scripts/fix-nitrogen-output.js for the Null.hpp patch). DO NOT lift-in-lockstep with nitrogen: any bump must be paired with re-running `yarn nitrogen:all` and re-validating all three RN package.json files plus iOS Podspec + Android Gradle. The 0.34.x runtime has NOT been validated against this branch's generated bridge code.
_notes.nitrogen: RN NitroModules build-time codegen CLI. Intentionally pinned to ^0.34.1 (cross-minor with react-native-nitro-modules ^0.33.9) — 0.34.x codegen output is known-compatible with the 0.33.x runtime on this branch via the Null.hpp post-patch in packages/core/scripts/fix-nitrogen-output.js. Bumping nitrogen MUST happen together with react-native-nitro-modules as a single PR that re-runs `yarn nitrogen:all` and re-validates the three RN package.json files + iOS Podspec + Android Gradle. CI (rn-typecheck) does not re-run nitrogen, so lockstep bumps will not be caught automatically.
